title: Whichever Branch
prompt: A sphinx bars the room. Complete its proof to banish it.
lore: The sphinx recites every promise you have ever broken, small as dust, and asks if she knows.
help: This room holds 2 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) or_elim(A, A, A) cases; each branch hands you an A. (2) contrapositive(B, A) then ⊢ ¬A ⇒ ¬B; by nn;.
